name: Fairfax India Holdings
bullCase: A highly discounted vehicle for elite capital allocation in the world's fastest-growing major economy. The impending IPO of Anchorage Infrastructure (Bangalore Airport), now expected in September 2026, is a massive near-term catalyst that will crystallize intrinsic value and narrow the steep NAV discount.
bearCase: Significant emerging market FX risk (Rupee depreciation) and illiquidity in its sum-of-the-parts portfolio. Unlocking value relies heavily on specific exit events rather than recurring distributions.

cagrModel.basis: Captures Bangalore Airport IPO catalyst and narrowing NAV discount.

description: Fairfax India Holdings Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as an investment holding company in India.
